metadata.description: Skeptical reviewers for Claude Code — audits sessions for unverified claims and critiques plans against intent.

plugins.name: assumption-auditor
plugins.description: Two passive reviewers. The auditor flags unverified diagnoses, completions, assumptions, and recalls in session output. The plan-critic critiques proposed plans for scope drift, spec violation, and internal incoherence against the user's request and reference docs.
